goal: Let Spark diagnose memory pathing issues from natural Telegram commands and recommend scoped repairs without directly mutating memory.

stages.name: detect
stages.description: Classify the Telegram phrase as a memory-doctor request and extract optional topic.

stages.name: trace
stages.description: Scan recent Builder memory influence, write, read, and tool-result events.

stages.name: ground
stages.description: Inspect active current-state profile facts when a human id is available.

stages.name: recommend
stages.description: Return a concise diagnosis and next action while preserving diagnosis-only authority.
